name: Arch Linux mkinitcpio UKI baseline
description: Arch Linux supports building UKIs via mkinitcpio preset `default_uki=/efi/EFI/Linux/arch-linux.efi' or via `ukify build'. The stock linux 6.x kernel in the [core] repo is built with CONFIG_SECURITY_LOCKDOWN_LSM=y (default `integrity' under Secure Boot) and CONFIG_IMA=y but without a default distro-wide IMA policy. The linux-hardened variant enables extra hardening including CONFIG_FORTIFY_SOURCE.
notes: Arch does not ship a signed shim by default; users typically self-enroll their own Machine Owner Key. For LapEE-on-Arch, attestation requires MOK enrollment + signed UKIs + a custom shim.
